---
name: User Story
about: Describe a user story following the structured issue format
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

One-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem or Value

Why is this needed, and who benefits from it?

## Scope and Expected Behavior

What should happen when this feature is implemented? Include key requirements.

## Acceptance Criteria

Observable, verifiable outcomes that must be true for this issue to be considered done.

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Out of Scope

What is explicitly not included in this issue? List non-goals and exclusions.

## Affected Area

Which part of the product is mainly affected?

- [ ] Employee and profile management
- [ ] Owner and animal tracking
- [ ] Adoption workflow
- [ ] Owner self-service portal
- [ ] Reporting and statistics
- [ ] Authentication and role management
- [ ] Centralized data management and integrations
- [ ] Other
